raw_consumer_statement: There was a charge for {$3100.00} that I did not authorize. I opened a fraud claim and was sent an email that Amex will not investigate it. I asked for it to be reopened and Amex said their decision stands. I know that Amex can investigate it for fraud when I did not do the transaction and evidence will show this as I did not do it so it is impossible that they can not investigate the fraud.
